arts.ttl: FA Cup: Fabian Hurzeler makes interesting Lewis Dunk decision as Brighton face Nottingham Forest in quarter-final
arts.sum: Brighton captain Lewis Dunk has been left out of Brighton’s starting XI to face Nottingham Forest in the FA Cup quarter final, despite his return from injury.

arts.ttl: Brighton v Nottingham Forest: FA Cup quarter-final – live
arts.sum: FA Cup quarter-final news from the 5.15pm GMT kick-off Live scores | Fulham 0-3 Crystal Palace | And email Scott Both of these teams go into this early-evening quarter-final with the wind in their sail. Brighton are unbeaten in seven, a run that has included two wins over Chelsea, victory in the FA Cup at Newcastle, and a come-from-behind draw at Manchester City. Forest meanwhile are four without defeat, a sequence that has seen them frustrate title hopefuls Arsenal and beat champions City. Good luck calling this one. Brighton make two changes to the starting XI named for the 2-2 draw at Manchester City. Danny Welbeck and Yasin Ayari replace João Pedro and Diego Gómez, who drop to the bench. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Club delighted after transfer battle with Leicester City to get Brighton man – Real bargain signing
arts.sum: Feyenoord are continuing to celebrate their success in signing Jakub Moder from Brighton and Hove Albion in January, after beating Leicester and a Saudi club to his signature. Report: Brighton & Hove Albion open to selling young attacker in summer
arts.sum: Brighton & Hove Albion are open to selling Julio Enciso this summer, with a price tag of around €30 million set for a permanent transfer.
